subcodes.first_line: That soul is among those who have, throughout most of their years, attained unto the Tablet of God and been adorned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنجناب از نفوسی هستند که در اکثری از سنین بلوح الله فائز گشته اند و بطراز
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
